' for row in rows), encoding='utf-8'); counts={}; [counts.__setitem__(row['kind'], counts.get(row['kind'],0)+1) for row in rows]; (root/'manifest.json').write_text(json.dumps({'recipe':'failure_patch','total_examples':len(rows),'by_kind':counts,'examples_path':str(ex)}, indent=2), encoding='utf-8'); (root/'README.md').write_text('# Failure Patch Corpus

Surgical patch for the current best checkpoint.
